usa_volleyball.expert_note: 2023-2025 USAV DCR Highlights: Rule 5.3.1 - One assistant coach may stand to give instructions within the free zone (extension of attack line to warm-up area). Rule 12.4.4 - For 14U and under, one service tossing error (catch or drop) is allowed per service turn, resulting in a re-serve. Rule 4.3.3.1a - Uniform numbers must be centered and clearly visible.

srva.expert_note: SRVA Policies: Tryout fee is capped at $75. Participants must have a valid USAV membership via SRVA before participating in tryouts. Offers accepted in SportsEngine are binding for the season.

faq.question: Where do I sign in for tryouts?
faq.answer: Check-in is at the front desk of Hooptown (6910 Stroop Ln, Smyrna). Doors open 30 minutes prior to your scheduled tryout time.

faq.question: What is the cost?
faq.answer: Tryout fees: $65 (Early), $70 (Regular), $75 (Late/Walk-up). 13s-18s fee increases June 15 and July 4. 12s fee increases Aug 20 and Sept 13.

faq.question: What do I need to be ready for?
faq.answer: Athletes should bring water, knee pads, and appropriate court shoes. You must have your USAV membership via SRVA and online registration completed.

faq.question: When will we know about team offers?
faq.answer: Initial offers are typically made within 24-48 hours after the conclusion of tryouts for your age group via email/SportsEngine.
